description: Regional context store. Source of truth for the WF regional KOL/marketing pipeline. Each region has its own JSON file under this directory. Order in `order` controls dashboard + library display order.

fields.card: Required. Summary fields for dashboard view.
fields.extended: Optional. Rich structured context for library view (market data, scorecards, products, regional playbooks, KOL programs, media partners, etc.)
fields.sources: Optional. List of meetings, decks, docs that fed into this region's intel.
